Contacts.title: Get in touch
Contacts.lead: Visit us at the studio, send us a message, or book your appointment — we're here to help.

hero.headline: Nature and science,
hero.subtitle: Proven physiotherapy and the gentle power of medicinal herbs — care for body and mind.

intro.heading: Palazzo Aesthetics
intro.body: We combine hands-on physiotherapy with the time-honoured tradition of phytotherapy. Our historical roots, paired with continuous medical training, let us offer a natural and effective solution for every need — for your health and your beauty alike.
intro.physioLine: Hands-on rehabilitation that restores movement and eases pain.
intro.phytoLine: Plant-based remedies drawn from a long phytotherapy tradition.

services.title: Our services
services.physiotherapyDesc: Personalised manual therapy and rehabilitation to relieve pain, restore mobility and rebuild strength. Every programme is tailored to your body — combining hands-on techniques, targeted exercise and recovery guidance to get you moving freely and confidently again.
services.phytotherapyDesc: The healing properties of officinal herbs, harnessed in treatments and care rituals for body and mind. Our signature herbal compress and natural extracts work gently with your body to soothe inflammation, restore balance and support lasting, everyday wellbeing.
services.trialDesc: Book a free trial and experience one of our treatments first-hand.

stats.title: Tradition and research for the care of your body
stats.subtitle: Through research and innovation we maximise the efficacy of herbal extracts and proven physiotherapy.
stats.yearsDesc: Decades of hands-on practice refining every treatment we offer.
stats.treatmentsDesc: A broad range of physiotherapy and phytotherapy programmes.
stats.clientsDesc: People who trusted us with their recovery and wellbeing.
stats.satisfactionDesc: Clients who would gladly send friends and family our way.

featured.title: The heart of our care: the Officinal Herbal Pack
featured.body: Our signature herbal compress, with its powerful natural anti-inflammatory action, is the versatile base across all our specializations — from physiotherapy to phytotherapy. Crafted with respect for nature, it is the essence of everything we do.

story.heading: Our story
story.lead: Palazzo started with a simple belief — that real care comes from people, not just protocols.
story.body1: What began as a small clinic is today a close-knit team of physiotherapists and wellbeing specialists who share one goal: helping you move, feel and live better.
story.body2: Everyone brings their own expertise, but we work as one — pairing hands-on physiotherapy with the natural power of phytotherapy to treat the whole person, not just the symptom.
story.body3: We learn together, grow together and stay close to the people we care for. That's the Palazzo difference: modern methods with genuine, human attention.

instagram.heading: Follow our journey
instagram.body: Join our community on Instagram and Facebook for treatments, tips and the latest news from Palazzo Aesthetics.

cta.newClientBody: Want to try our treatments? Book an appointment to experience one of our treatments first-hand.
cta.newsletterBody: Stay up to date on promotions and new treatments.
cta.newsletterConsent: By subscribing you accept the terms of our privacy policy and consent to receive information emails from Palazzo Aesthetics.

AboutPage.title: About us
AboutPage.lead: We're a team of physiotherapists and wellbeing specialists who believe care should be personal, natural and grounded in evidence.

story.heading: Our story
story.body1: Palazzo began with a small clinic and a big conviction — that real recovery comes from treating the whole person, not just the symptom.
story.body2: Over the years we've grown into a multidisciplinary practice, pairing hands-on physiotherapy with the natural power of phytotherapy under one roof.
story.body3: Today that same conviction guides everything we do: modern methods, natural remedies and the patience to see each person through to lasting results.

who.heading: Who we are
who.body1: Behind Palazzo is a close-knit team of physiotherapists, movement specialists and phytotherapy experts who genuinely love what they do.
who.body2: We learn together, share what works, and stay close to the people we care for — so every plan is built around you, not a template.

why.heading: Why choose us
why.subtitle: What makes the Palazzo approach different.
why.evidenceDesc: Every treatment is grounded in current research and proven clinical practice.
why.naturalDesc: We combine physiotherapy with phytotherapy to support your body the gentle way.
why.personalDesc: No two bodies are the same — your programme is built around your goals and history.
why.teamDesc: A multidisciplinary team means the right expert for every stage of your recovery.
why.techDesc: Up-to-date equipment and techniques for faster, more comfortable results.
why.followupDesc: We stay with you beyond the clinic — at home and through every milestone.

results.heading: Our results & services
results.subtitle: Numbers we're proud of — and the services behind them.
results.clientsDesc: People who've trusted us with their recovery and wellbeing.
results.satisfactionDesc: Clients who'd recommend Palazzo to friends and family.
results.teamDesc: Therapists and experts across physiotherapy and phytotherapy.
results.experienceDesc: Refining our approach and growing alongside our community.

services.heading: Our services
services.subtitle: Two disciplines, one integrated approach to your health.
services.physiotherapyDesc: Hands-on assessment, rehabilitation and movement therapy to restore strength and mobility.
services.phytotherapyDesc: Natural, plant-based remedies that complement your treatment and support recovery.

hero.title: Move better with
hero.subtitle: Hands-on, evidence-based treatment to relieve pain, restore movement and get you back to doing what you love.

description.heading: What is physiotherapy?
description.body1: Physiotherapy is a hands-on, movement-based therapy that assesses and treats the root cause of pain and restricted mobility — not just the symptoms.
description.body2: At Palazzo, every session begins with a thorough assessment. From there your physiotherapist designs a tailored programme of manual therapy, targeted exercise and modern techniques to rebuild strength, flexibility and confidence.

helps.heading: How physiotherapy helps
helps.body: Whether you're recovering from an injury, managing a chronic condition or simply moving less freely than you'd like, physiotherapy meets you where you are and guides you forward.
helps.point1: Relieves acute and chronic pain without relying on medication.
helps.point2: Restores joint mobility, muscle strength and balance.
helps.point3: Speeds recovery after injury, surgery or sport.
helps.point4: Prevents re-injury with lasting movement habits.

benefits.heading: The benefits you'll feel
benefits.subtitle: What physiotherapy at Palazzo gives you, session after session.
benefits.item1Desc: Targeted treatment that calms pain at its source.
benefits.item2Desc: Move more freely, with greater range and ease.
benefits.item3Desc: Get back to work, sport and life sooner.
benefits.item4Desc: Rebuild the muscle and stability you've lost.
benefits.item5Desc: Habits and exercises that keep you well long-term.
benefits.item6Desc: A dedicated therapist with you at every step.

cta.heading: Book your physiotherapy session
cta.body: Take the first step towards moving and feeling better. Our team is ready to help.

hero.title: Heal naturally with
hero.subtitle: The healing power of plants — natural, science-backed remedies that support your body gently and effectively.

description.heading: What is phytotherapy?
description.body1: Phytotherapy is the therapeutic use of plants and their active compounds to prevent and treat illness — one of the oldest forms of medicine, refined by modern science.
description.body2: At Palazzo, we pair traditional botanical knowledge with current research to create natural remedies that complement your care, support recovery and strengthen your body's own balance.

helps.heading: How phytotherapy helps
helps.body: Plant-based therapy works with your body rather than against it, offering gentle, effective support for a wide range of everyday concerns.
helps.point1: Calms inflammation with potent natural compounds.
helps.point2: Supports the immune system and overall vitality.
helps.point4: Promotes relaxation, better sleep and balance.

benefits.heading: The benefits you'll feel
benefits.subtitle: What phytotherapy at Palazzo gives you, naturally.
benefits.item1Desc: Gentle remedies that work with your body.
benefits.item2Desc: Plant compounds that soothe and calm.
benefits.item5Desc: Calm the mind and sleep more deeply.
benefits.item6Desc: Treating the person, not just the symptom.

cta.heading: Book your phytotherapy session
cta.body: Discover what natural, plant-based care can do for you. We're here to help.
